title: Read attempt number from Oban.Job and log progress
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.LongFetchWorker` (queue `:external_api`, max_attempts 5). perform/1 should destructure `attempt` from the `%Oban.Job{}` and log `Logger.info("attempt #{attempt}")`. Then call `MyApp.ExternalAPI.fetch(id)` where `id` comes from `%{"id" => id}` in args. Return `:ok` on success, `{:error, reason}` otherwise. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/long_fetch_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Basic introspection of the Job struct; tests that `perform/1` receives the struct, not a bare args map.
